creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
farrokhi    2006-11-08 20:22:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/phpip            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  phpIP Management is a complete IPv4 IPAM (IP address management) suite, built to handle the complexity of managing today's IP address space. phpIP Management was built to scale and address the full lifecycle of IP address space using techniques that are not administratively intensive.
  
  PR:             ports/104886
  Submitted by:   self
  Approved by:    miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1596    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/www/phpip/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/phpip/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/www/phpip/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +104 -0    ports/www/phpip/pkg-plist (new)
